mapper.insert: INSERT INTO API_SYNC_LOG (LOG_ID, API_KEY, DAILY_CALLS, LAST_PAGE, TOTAL_PAGES, STATUS, LAST_RESET_DATE) VALUES (API_SYNC_LOG_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{apiKey}, 0, 0, 0, 'IDLE', SYSDATE)
mapper.update: UPDATE API_SYNC_LOG SET LAST_PAGE = #{lastPage}, TOTAL_PAGES = #{totalPages}, COLLECT_SYNC = #{collectSync}, UPDATE_SYNC = #{updateSync}, STATUS = #{status}, DAILY_CALLS = #{dailyCalls}, LAST_RESET_DATE = #{lastResetDate}, LAST_OVERVIEW_ID = #{lastOverviewId} WHERE API_KEY = #{apiKey}
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO LANDMARK L USING (SELECT #{contentId} AS CONTENT_ID FROM DUAL) S ON (L.CONTENT_ID = S.CONTENT_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TITLE = #{title}, ADDR1 = #{addr1}, ADDR2 = #{addr2}, FIRSTIMAGE = #{firstimage}, FIRSTIMAGE2 = #{firstimage2}, MAPX = #{mapx}, MAPY = #{mapy}, TEL = #{tel}, CONTENT_TYPE_ID = #{contentTypeId} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (CONTENT_ID, TITLE, ADDR1, ADDR2, FIRSTIMAGE, FIRSTIMAGE2, MAPX, MAPY, TEL, CONTENT_TYPE_ID) VALUES (#{contentId}, #{title}, #{addr1}, #{addr2}, #{firstimage}, #{firstimage2}, #{mapx}, #{mapy}, #{tel}, #{contentTypeId})
mapper.select: SELECT CONTENT_ID FROM LANDMARK WHERE CONTENT_ID > #{lastOverviewId} AND (OVERVIEW IS NULL OR DBMS_LOB.GETLENGTH(OVERVIEW) = 0) ORDER BY CONTENT_ID FETCH FIRST #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LANDMARK WHERE OVERVIEW IS NOT NULL AND DBMS_LOB.GETLENGTH(OVERVIEW) > 0
